<div class="titleCont "><div class="page-title"><div class="title"><span class="flag fr w32"></span><span class="flag c24 fr "></span> <h1><span class="hideIfMobile">2015 &nbsp; » &nbsp; 102nd </span>Tour de France</h1></div><div class="subtitle hide imob block"><h2>2015</h2></div><div class="clear"></div><div class="title-line2 hideIfMobile"><font class="blue">21 Stages</font> &nbsp; » &nbsp; <font class="red">Utrecht &nbsp;›&nbsp; Paris</font> &nbsp; <font class="red" style="font-weight: normal; ">(3360.3km)</font></div></div><a class="toggleSideMenu" href="">menu</a></div>
<div class="desktop-ad leaderbord general"></div><div class="mob-ad leaderbord general"></div><div class="top-cont"></div><div class="top-cont-mobile top-cont-mobile-race"></div>
<div class="page-content noSideNav">
<h2>Start</h2>
<div class=""><div class="borderbox w100">
<div class="">
<div class="fs14">Statistics on Tour de France 2015.</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="borderbox w50 left mb_w100 mg_r2">
<div class="mt20">

<div class="clear"></div></div><div class="push"></div></div><div class="footer"><div class="sfa"><ul class="ftr-list"><li class="group"><h3>Grand Tours</h3><ul><li><a href="race/tour-de-france">Tour de France</a></li>

</ul></li><li class="group"><h3>Monuments</h3><ul><li><a href="race/milano-sanremo">Milano-SanRemo</a></li>
